title: [BUG] SyntaxError: Unexpected token *
author: renatojuniorrs

comments.author: heyauri
comments.body:
I have encounter this error too.
And I found that it may  result from the using of a dependency named "readdir-glob" which uses the generator function in its code directly.
I found the core-js not work on this problem.
Have you addressed this?

node verson:v8.11.3

comments.author: song-coco
comments.body:
I have the same error.
Have you solved this problem？
My version is :
  node version: v8.9.1,
  exceljs version:4.3.0,
  core-js version:3.21.0,
  regenerator-runtime version:0.13.9
